body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-42327", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:H/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-20", "name": "Improper Input Validation"}], "description": "`X509Ref::ocsp_responders` returns OCSP responder URLs from a certificate's AIA extension as `OpensslString`, whose `Deref<Target = str>` wraps the raw bytes with `str::from_utf8_unchecked`. OpenSSL does not enforce that the underlying IA5String is ASCII, so a certificate with non-UTF-8 bytes in its OCSP accessLocation causes safe Rust code to construct a `&str` that violates the UTF-8 invariant — resulting in undefined behavior.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00211, "percentile": 0.11207}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-xp3w-r5p5-63rr", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-05T21:46:38Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-xp3w-r5p5-63rr", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-xp3w-r5p5-63rr"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-42327"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-14T21:16:45Z", "published_at": "2026-05-05T21:46:38Z", "references": ["https://github.com/rust-openssl/rust-openssl/security/advisories/GHSA-xp3w-r5p5-63rr", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42327", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-xp3w-r5p5-63rr"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/rust-openssl/rust-openssl/security-advisories/GHSA-xp3w-r5p5-63rr", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/rust-openssl/rust-openssl", "summary": "rust-openssl has undefined behavior in X509Ref::ocsp_responders for certificates with non-UTF-8 OCSP URLs", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-15T23:45:53Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-xp3w-r5p5-63rr", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.10.79", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "openssl"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 0.9.7, < 0.10.79"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: rust-openssl has undefined behavior in X509Ref::ocsp_responders for certificates with non-UTF-8 OCSP URLs
